---
title: "Week 2"
subtitle: "Microeconomic Theory & Data"
---

## Prepare

📖 Read Ch. 2 of Regression and Other Stories [ROS](https://github.com/UNL-Hawkins-Lab/CIVE_461/blob/6ae2e8ca1576a517b809c1d6ffb832f84695dbf1/Resources/Gelman_Et_Al_ROS_1ed.pdf)

## Participate

🖥️ [Activity 2 - Ecological Economics](/teaching/CIVE461/ae/ae-2.html)
🖥️ [Activity 3 - Data](/teaching/CIVE461/ae/ae-3.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/CIVE461/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
